content.en:
At this moment, these extradimensional realms are secretly communicating.

"How precious is the treasure that can assist in comprehending the rules of the extradimensional dimension, who sent this treasure?"

"It can't be the Garan Chamber of Commerce itself to take out the auction, the Garan Chamber of Commerce also needs this kind of resource, no matter which force will not feel that there are many such treasures. "

"I know who auctioned this treasure?"

"Who is it?"

"It's the old guy from the Tianyang family, the Tianyang Realm Lord, the Tianyang Realm Lord has been hit hard, and it is said that he is trying to snatch a treasure, and this treasure should be this finale item. The Heavenly Yang Realm Lord is said to have survived with a large amount of Heavenly Chaos Realm Ruins Grass, but he can't do it easily, otherwise he will still fall. And the Tianyang Family can't keep this treasure, if it is used by other extra-dimensional realms of the Tianyang Family, the hope of comprehending the super-dimensional rules is still very low. Therefore, the Tianyang Realm Lord will take out this treasure for the Jialan Chamber of Commerce to auction, after all, in the Extreme Yang Realm, only the Jialan Chamber of Commerce will not snatch this treasure of the Tianyang Realm Lord!"

"I see, I only know that something happened to this guy of the Tianyang Realm Lord, it turned out that he had an accident to snatch this treasure! "

While these extradimensional realms were communicating, the Ice Phoenix Realm Lord began to announce the start of the auction.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the starting price of this finale item is 100 billion Gachshire Coins. "

The Ice Phoenix Realm Lord said.

100 billion Galanbao coins is nothing for these extra-dimensional realms, and some extra-dimensional realms are not far from comprehending the extradimensional rules, maybe you can use this treasure to comprehend the extradimensional rules!

Once you comprehend the rules of the extradimensionality, it is a new world, and both strength and status are far from being comparable to before.

Therefore, in order to bid for this treasure, some extradimensional realms are even willing to give everything they have.

150 Billion Gachin!

200 Billion Galanbao Coins!

300 Billion Galanbao Coins!

These extradimensional realm powerhouses are completely crazy about this treasure.

However, the extra-dimensional realms that dare to participate in the auction are all from the extra-dimensional realms among the powerful extra-dimensional forces, and they all have backers behind them, otherwise they would not dare to bid.

After all, even the Tianyang family can't keep this kind of treasure, and the general extradimensional power can't keep it, even if the auction is over, it is estimated that the auction venue will be attacked by even more powerful extradimensional realm powerhouses.

This kind of thing is not once or twice, there are many powerhouses in the extra-dimensional realm who have been attacked and killed, and they are all treasures that they don't have the strength to keep their bidding.

Therefore, before you don't have a certain strength, don't let other strong people know that they have amazing treasures, otherwise they will be targeted.

"These extra-dimensional realm powerhouses are really rich! my entire net worth can't even compare to a fraction of them!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

After a long time, the auction price of this finale item has soared to 900 billion Galanbol coins, and according to this trend, there is a high probability that it can be auctioned to the extent of one trillion Galanbol coins.

Really.

The final price was 1 trillion garnapphire coins.

One trillion Gala Treasure Coins, even if all the 7,362 Territory is packaged and sold, and all the resources are counted, it is far less than one trillion Gala Treasure Coins!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian paid the Jialanbao Coin and took the two auction items he had bid on.

......

After coming out of the auction hall, Ye Tian did not leave here.

He was also worried that he would be attacked, so he rented a mansion here to refine these two treasures.

However, not long after the auction ended.

Bang!!!!

A terrifying battle fluctuation came from the void in the distance, which seemed to have spread to the Infinite Territory and shook the origin of the Extreme Yang Realm.

Ye Tian said darkly.

Obviously, this is an extradimensional realm that has attacked the extradimensional realm participating in the auction, and there is a high probability that the extradimensional realm powerhouse who bid for the last finale item has been attacked.

But this matter has nothing to do with Ye Tian, it involves the killing of the powerhouses of the Extradimensional Realm, and he is far from qualified to participate in it.

"I'd better use the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead and the Extradimensional Origin Bead!"

Ye Tian first used the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead to see how effective this treasure was on the refining of the power of the extra-dimensional. []

I saw him swallow it in one gulp, and then use the power of the super dimension to refine, integrate his energy into the super dimensional heart domain, and then refine the power of the super dimension.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's superdimensional power was quickly refined, and the Immortal Golden Pile was of no use to him now, but the Immortal Golden Pith Bead had a very good effect.

With the help of this immortal golden marrow bead, the superdimensional power of Ye Tian Dacheng's realm was quickly tempered and improved.

After a long time, this immortal golden pith bead was completely consumed by Ye Tian.

However, he still hadn't refined the power of the extradimensional dimension to the consummation realm.

"Just one Immortal Golden Marrow Bead is far from enough, if I want to refine the power of the Transcendent Dimension to the Perfection Realm, I need at least multiple Immortal Golden Marrow Beads!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But now that he can bid for one, it is already very good, and he can only wait to see if there is a chance to get another immortal golden pith bead in the future.

Then, he took out the Extradimensional Origin Bead, a treasure that helped refine the Extradimensional Body.

At present, his extradimensional body is only at the level where it has just begun to be refined, and it is almost negligible.

He swallowed the Transcendental Origin Bead in one gulp, then refined this Extradimensional Origin Bead, and began to refine his Extradimensional Body with his Extradimensional Dao Seed.

I have to say that Ye Tian's physical body is too strong, and his foundation is too terrifying, even with the assistance of a perfect superdimensional Dao species, coupled with the superdimensional origin bead, the effect of refining the superdimensional body is not so good.

His refining was indeed very fast, but until this (Zhao Zhao Zhao) Extradimensional Origin Bead was exhausted, he had only completed one percent of the refining strength of his Transcendent Body.

In other words, he still needed at least ninety-nine of these extradimensional origin beads.

However.

A super-dimensional origin bead is incomparably precious and rare, where to find ninety-nine such extra-dimensional origin beads?

At this time, Ye Tiancai realized that without a background, just on his own, it would take an infinite number of years to go from a half-step superdimensional realm to a superdimensional realm!

And during this period, I don't know how many half-step super-dimensional realm powerhouses who would have inevitably become extra-dimensional realms have fallen because of the competition for various resources.

Therefore, in this extremely cruel territory of the Six Thousand Territory, the background is really important, otherwise it will be difficult to grow.

"I have to find a way to find out where there are the Super Dimensional Origin Beads and Immortal Golden Marrow Beads, otherwise my strength will not be able to improve quickly!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
